_meta.description: Google News RSS query config. Topic queries run every cycle; player/team queries rotate so we don't hammer Google with one request per entity. publisher_whitelist gates which sources land in the shard.

entity_queries.comment: Player/team queries are generated from canonical lists at runtime. To avoid 400+ queries every 15 min, a rotating SUBSET runs each cycle — see poll_google_news rotation logic. With players_per_cycle=25 against ~39 canonical players, every player is queried roughly every other cycle; with teams_per_cycle=10 against 30 canonical teams, every team is queried every ~3 cycles. As the player canonical list grows, expect ~4-hour coverage per player.

publisher_whitelist.comment: fuzzy = case-insensitive substring match in either direction. So 'ESPN.com' matches 'ESPN' and 'AP' matches 'Associated Press' only if AP appears as a substring (it doesn't, so AP-tagged publishers need a literal whitelist entry). Publishers matching neither tier are dropped.
